name: Absa Bank Limited
summary: Absa Bank Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides various banking products and services in South Africa, Nigeria, and Namibia. The company accepts cheque, youth, transactional, and business accounts. Its loan products include personal, home, car, study, structured, short, and medium term, and trade and working capital finance; vehicle and asset, property, and debt finance; and overdraft and revolving products. The company also offers credit and debit cards; savings and investment products; business insurance products; and youth and student, Islamic and international banking, investment management, retirement planning, trust and will, and foreign exchange services. In addition, it provides corporate banking solutions; exchange traded products; market services; trade and working capital solutions; and cash management, payment, and liquidity products and solutions. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Johannesburg, South Africa. Absa Bank Limited is a subsidiary of Absa Group Limited.
